summary: 2026-07-17 11:26:10 PDT (America/Los_Angeles) — Both approved fixes are correct and complete. Removing `validate: false` preserves the constant process-global key while restoring applicable limiter validation; initialization emits no validation warnings. The narrowed handler returns bare 4xx statuses for exposed body-parser errors, including oversized bodies as 413, and forwards genuine faults with `next(err)`. No regressions to AC1, AC10, AC5, or AC6 were found. Direct middleware checks passed; HTTP tests could not bind sockets in the read-only sandbox (`EPERM`).
